label: Prompt Template
description: Build a reusable prompt with {{variable}} placeholders. Outputs either a single rendered string ('prompt' mode) or a structured chat conversation split on {{system}} / {{user}} / {{assistant}} role markers ('messages' mode).

settings.name: template
settings.label: Template body
settings.description: Prompt body with {{variable}} placeholders. In 'messages' mode, use {{system}} / {{user}} / {{assistant}} markers to segment a chat conversation.

settings.name: variables
settings.label: Variables
settings.description: Map of variable name → value (or {{upstream.X}} template). Values are resolved through the engine interpolation layer before substitution so nested references work.

settings.name: outputAs
settings.label: Output shape
settings.description: 'prompt' = single rendered string ({{steps.X.prompt}}). 'messages' = structured chat conversation split on role markers ({{steps.X.messages}}).

ai.shortDescription: Render a reusable prompt with variables — string or structured chat output.
ai.whenToUse: When the same prompt body is used across flows, when you want clean separation of prompt body and per-call values, or when you need a pre-built chat conversation for an LLM/agent downstream.
ai.examplePrompt: build a summarization prompt with {{style}} and {{text}} variables, output as a single string
ai.promptHints: Output: {{steps.X.prompt}} for string mode, {{steps.X.messages}} for chat array. Pair with llm_completion for the string mode, agent_single or a multi-turn LLM node for messages mode.

outputAssertions.name: has_render
outputAssertions.errorMessage: prompt_template produced no rendered output — template body may be empty or all role-marker sections collapsed.
